detaileddescription.para: edge from one mesh and triangle from another mesh Generated from class MR::EdgeTri. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

Generated from class MR::VarEdgeTri::FlaggedTri. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

if isEdgeATriB() == true, then stores edge from mesh A and triangle from mesh B if isEdgeATriB() == false, then stores edge from mesh B and triangle from mesh A Generated from class MR::VarEdgeTri. Supported MR_PassBy modes: MR_PassBy_DefaultConstruct, MR_PassBy_Copy, MR_PassBy_Move (and MR_PassBy_DefaultArgument and MR_PassBy_NoObject if supported by the callee).

Returns a pointer to a member variable of class MR::EdgeTri named edge. Parameter _this can not be null. It is a single object. The returned pointer will never be null. It is non-owning, do NOT destroy it. The reference to this object might be preserved as the return value.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_MeshPart *a, const MR_MeshPart *b, MR_PassBy conv_pass_by, MR_std_function_MR_Vector3i_from_const_MR_Vector3f_ref *conv, const MR_AffineXf3f *rigidB2A, const bool *anyIntersection)
memberdef.name: MR_findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise_5

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding edges from one mesh and triangle from another mesh

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation

if true then the function returns as fast as it finds any intersection Generated from function MR::findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise. Parameter a can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter b can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rigidB2A defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter anyIntersection has a default argument: false, pass a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_std_vector_MR_VarEdgeTri_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_MeshPart *mp, MR_PassBy conv_pass_by, MR_std_function_MR_Vector3i_from_const_MR_Vector3f_ref *conv, const bool *anyIntersection, const MR_AffineXf3f *rigidB2A, const int *aVertSizes)
memberdef.name: MR_findSelfCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise

briefdescription.para: finds all pairs of colliding edges and triangle within one mesh

parameterdescription.para: if true then the function returns as fast as it finds any intersection
rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation, might be useful to obtain same result as in boolean operation would for mesh B

used in float to int conversion, might be useful to obtain same result as in boolean operation would for mesh B Generated from function MR::findSelfCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise. Parameter mp can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter anyIntersection has a default argument: false, pass a null pointer to use it. Parameter rigidB2A defaults to a null pointer in C++. Parameter aVertSizes has a default argument: 0, pass a null pointer to use it. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_std_vector_MR_EdgeTri_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *a, const MR_std_vector_MR_EdgeId *edgesA, const MR_Mesh *b, const MR_std_vector_MR_FaceId *facesB, MR_PassBy conv_pass_by, MR_std_function_MR_Vector3i_from_const_MR_Vector3f_ref *conv, const MR_AffineXf3f *rigidB2A)
memberdef.name: MR_findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise_6_std_vector_MR_EdgeId

detaileddescription.para: finds all intersections between every given edge from A and given triangles from B Generated from function MR::findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise. Parameter a can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter edgesA can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter b can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter facesB can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rigidB2A defaults to a null pointer in C++. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_std_vector_MR_EdgeTri_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

memberdef.argsstring: (const MR_Mesh *a, const MR_std_vector_MR_FaceId *facesA, const MR_Mesh *b, const MR_std_vector_MR_EdgeId *edgesB, MR_PassBy conv_pass_by, MR_std_function_MR_Vector3i_from_const_MR_Vector3f_ref *conv, const MR_AffineXf3f *rigidB2A)
memberdef.name: MR_findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise_6_std_vector_MR_FaceId

detaileddescription.para: finds all intersections between every given triangle from A and given edge from B Generated from function MR::findCollidingEdgeTrisPrecise. Parameter a can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter facesA can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter b can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter edgesB can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rigidB2A defaults to a null pointer in C++. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_std_vector_MR_EdgeTri_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: creates simple converters from Vector3f to Vector3i and back in mesh part area range

detaileddescription.para: Generated from function MR::getVectorConverters. Parameter a can not be null. It is a single object. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_CoordinateConverters_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.

briefdescription.para: creates simple converters from Vector3f to Vector3i and back in mesh parts area range

parameterdescription.para: rigid transformation from B-mesh space to A mesh space, nullptr considered as identity transformation Generated from function MR::getVectorConverters. Parameter a can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter b can not be null. It is a single object. Parameter rigidB2A defaults to a null pointer in C++. Never returns null. Returns an instance allocated on the heap! Must call MR_CoordinateConverters_Destroy() to free it when you're done using it.
